response.justification: Bogdan has extensive full-stack engineering experience spanning 25+ years with clear technical depth in diverse languages and systems, including AI-agent infrastructure and cloud tooling, but lacks explicit evidence of AI product leadership, cloud platform strategy, or director-level influence in AI-driven innovation required for this role.
strengths: 25+ years of hands-on software engineering across multiple domains including AI-agent systems and cloud infrastructure
Proven entrepreneurial initiative through long-standing open-source GIS platform and multiple personal tooling projects
Strong technical breadth with fluency in DLang, TypeScript, Node.js, and cloud-native tooling (Kubernetes, CDK)
concerns: No clear evidence of building or leading AI-powered products or platforms at scale
Lacks documented experience in cloud AI strategy, customer advisory, or cross-functional technical leadership at director level
No advanced degree in AI or related field; education ends at BS with no mention of AI/ML specialization
